commands.purpose: List Organizations for one tenant. --parent=<id> narrows to direct children of that parent; --parent=null narrows to root nodes. --depth caps the walk. Renders as an indented tree by default; --format=json emits machine-readable output.
Print full detail for one Organization including ancestors (root-to-self), direct children, all descendants, referencing branches, and referencing teams. Used by support to diagnose scoping issues.
CLI create bypassing the API. Applies every observer + rule. Consumes organization_slot. --make-default demotes the tenant's current default in the same transaction.

Move an Organization under a new parent (or to root when new_parent omitted). Refused on cross-tenant / cycle / depth-cap violation. --reason feeds the audit row. Dispatches RebuildTreePathsJob synchronously for CLI-callers so the exit code reflects the tree update result.
Flip is_default=true on the target row + auto-demote the current default. Fires OrganizationDefaultChanged.
Visual tree render. --format={indent,ascii,dot}. `dot` output pipes into Graphviz for org-chart PDFs.
Transition status → paused. Refused when is_default=true. Emits OrganizationStatusChanged.
Transition status → active. Only valid from paused.
Transition status → archived + soft-delete. Refused when is_default=true, when descendants exist, or when branches reference this org. Releases the organization_slot entitlement.
Force RebuildTreePathsJob to walk + recompute tree_path for a subtree (or the whole tenant). Support tool for suspected tree drift. --dry-run prints planned changes without writing.
Sweep every tenant (or the given one) for the is_default invariant. Zero defaults → promote the oldest active row; multiple defaults → keep the oldest, demote the rest. --dry-run lists violations.
